reason: Successfully tested agent messaging flow: navigated to agent, verified idle status, sent math question, and received correct response "4" within 1 second.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut app with sidebar containing agents
Step 2 - Found and clicked agent "QA-20260723-004621-hgn2" in sidebar — Agent page loaded successfully at URL /agents/qa-20260723-004621-hgn2-w9p2aunchn
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle" (visible in agent header)
Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field and send button clicked successfully
Step 5 - Waited for response — Agent responded immediately within 1 second (displayed "Worked for 1s")
Step 6 - Verified response mentions "4" — Agent response displays "4" which is the correct answer to the math question
Step 7 - Took screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message and agent response
